  (= 
    (Truth_Deduction 
      ($f1 $c1) 
      ($f2 $c2)) 
    ( (* $f1 $f2) (* (* $f1 $f2) (* $c1 $c2))))
;; In file as:  
  !(Truth_Deduction 
    (1.0 0.9) 
    (1.0 0.9))
;; To unit test case:
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (Truth_Deduction 
      (1.0 0.9) 
      (1.0 0.9)) 
    ( (1.0 0.81)))

[

;
;; METTA-MORPH-TESTS.NESTED-PARAMETERS.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.001 secs. (1.13 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (Truth_Deduction 
      (1.0 0.9) 
      (1.0 0.9)) 
    ( (1.0 0.81)))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      ( (1.0 0.81)) 
      ( (1.0 0.81))))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_6100))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (Truth_Deduction 
            (1.0 0.9) 
            (1.0 0.9)) 
          ( (1.0 0.81))) $_3982) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4354) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3982 $_4382) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4382)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_6100))  
    (,

        (assertEqualToResult

            (1.0 0.9) 
            (1.0 0.9)) 
          ( (1.0 0.81))) $_3982) 
      (,

          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4382)))))
